commands.review_summary:
The PR adds configured model choices and an argument menu to `/model`, then adjusts Discord and Telegram native command handling and tests around model picker and callback-limit behavior.

PR surface: Source +83, Tests +232. Total +315 across 11 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a feature PR. Source inspection shows current main and `v2026.6.9` lack `/model` menu choices, while the PR head adds them through the shared registry.
